ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the restaurant was added to the system */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the restaurant information was last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the restaurant */,
  "categories" TEXT /* Categories the restaurant belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the restaurant is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the restaurant is located */,
  "keys" TEXT /* Unique keys or identifiers for the restaurant */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate for geolocation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate for geolocation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the restaurant location */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province of the restaurant location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the restaurant */,
  "payment_methods" TEXT /* Payment methods accepted by the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_postal_code FOREIGN KEY ("postal_code") REFERENCES postal_codes ("postal_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_province FOREIGN KEY ("province") REFERENCES provinces ("province_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_categories FOREIGN KEY ("categories") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Fast Food, American Restaurant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province in which the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country in which the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the province is located */,
  "capital_city" INTEGER /* Capital city of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postal_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postal code */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code for a specific area */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with the postal code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postal_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_categories" (
  "restaurant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source URL */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source of information about the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the restaurant associated with the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., website, social media, review site) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_sources_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website URL */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the restaurant's website */,
  "restaurant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the restaurant associated with the website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_websites_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the restaurant data */,
  "restaurant_id" TEXT /* ID of the restaurant being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the restaurant data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" TEXT /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_ratings" (
  "restaurant_id" TEXT /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the session started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the session ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics entry was recorded */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., page views, unique visitors) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
